app_release_notes: v0.18.2 - The in-app User Manual and welcome tour now show measuring your target groups right in Loadscope. The app now always checks for updates on launch so you never miss one. Plus a clearer error report, startup hardening, and an up-to-date What's New list.

mac.app_release_notes: v0.18.2 - The in-app User Manual and welcome tour now show measuring your target groups right in Loadscope. The app now always checks for updates on launch so you never miss one. Plus a clearer error report, startup hardening, and an up-to-date What's New list.

windows.app_release_notes: v0.18.0 - Import from phone: measure your groups in the Loadscope phone app and pull them straight into your load on the desktop over Wi-Fi, each target matched to its charge. New on the Measure tab: pick a Powder or Seating-depth ladder, and enter a custom bullet diameter.
